text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Kevin is correct for what you need to do by: 

Uninstall clutter-cairo and reinstall cairo. I am not sure why your 
portupgrade does not pick up the /usr/ports/MOVED: 

# grep clutter /usr/ports/MOVED  
graphics/clutter-cairo|graphics/clutter|2009-11-28|This port is 
obsolete, all functionality is now in graphics/clutter
